arabicText: وَسِيلَةُ الْمُحَارِبِينَ حِصْنُنَا الْأَعْظَمُ مِنْ كُلِّ كَيْدٍ وَحَاسِدٍ وَشَرٍّ
latinTransliteration: Wasīlatul-muḥāribīna ḥiṣnunāl-a‘ẓamu min kulli kaydin wa ḥāsidin wa sharr
englishTranslation: Wasilat al-Muharibin is our greatest fortress against every plot, envious person, and evil.
wolofTranslationStandard: Wasilat al-Muharibin sunu jumaa gu rëy la buy fadd péxey tookoñ ak mbugal.
wolofalAjamiScript: وَسِيلَةُ الْمُحَارِبِينَ سُنُ جُمَعْ جُ رِي لَ بُيْ فَدْ پِيخِي تُوكُنْ اَكْ مْبُجَلْ

arabicText: نَلُوذُ بِجَلَالِ الرَّحْمَنِ فِي السُّرِّ وَالْجَهْرِ لِيَحْفَظَنَا مِنَ السُّوءِ
latinTransliteration: Nalūdhu bi-jalālir-Raḥmāni fis-sirri wal-jahri li-yaḥfaẓanā minas-sū'
englishTranslation: We seek refuge in the majesty of the All-Merciful in secret and in public, that He may protect us from evil.
wolofTranslationStandard: Noongi laxatu ci ndam Yàlla Ku yërménde ca lëndëm ak ca leer ngir mu aar nu.
wolofalAjamiScript: نُونْجِ لَخَتُ سِ نْدَمْ يَٚlَّ كُ يِٜrْمِينْدِ سَ لِٜnْدِٜmْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ نْجِرْ مُ آرْ نُ

arabicText: فَلَا نَخَافُ الْأَعْدَاءَ وَلَا نَخْشَى الضَّرَّ مَادَامَ اللَّهُ مَعَنَا سُبْحَانَهُ
latinTransliteration: Falā nakhāful-a‘dā'a wa lā nakhshāḍ-ḍarra mādāma-llāhu ma‘anā subḥānahu
englishTranslation: So we do not fear enemies, nor do we dread harm, as long as Allah is with us, glorified is He.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te dunu ragal sunuy noon, te dunu tiit ci bépp loral, ndax Yàlla and na ak nun.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دُنُ رَجَلْ سُنُيْ نُونْ تِ دُنُ تِيتْ سِ بِيقْ لُرَلْ نْدَخْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ نَ اَكْ نُنْ

arabicText: يَا مَنْ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَالْمَلَكُوتُ اعْصِمْنَا بِحَقِّ الْأَسْمَاءِ الْحُسْنَى دائماً
latinTransliteration: Yā man lahul-mulku wal-malakūtu-‘ṣimnā bi-ḥaqqil-asmā'il-ḥusnā dā'imā

arabicText: نَلُوذُ بِجَلَالِ الرَّحْمَنِ فِي السُّرِّ وَالْجَهْرِ لِيَحْفَظَنَا مِنَ السُّوءِ [94]
latinTransliteration: Nalūdhu bi-jalālir-Raḥmāni fis-sirri wal-jahri li-yaḥfaẓanā minas-sū' (94)
englishTranslation: We seek refuge in the majesty of the All-Merciful in secret and in public, that He may protect us from evil. (Stanza 94)
wolofTranslationStandard: Noongi laxatu ci ndam Yàlla Ku yërménde ca lëndëm ak ca leer ngir mu aar nu. (Wers 94)
wolofalAjamiScript: نُونْجِ لَخَتُ سِ نْدَمْ يَٚlَّ كُ يِٜrْمِينْدِ سَ لِٜnْدِٜmْ اَكْ سَ لِيرْ نْجِرْ مُ آرْ نُ [94]

arabicText: فَلَا نَخَافُ الْأَعْدَاءَ وَلَا نَخْشَى الضَّرَّ مَادَامَ اللَّهُ مَعَنَا سُبْحَانَهُ [95]
latinTransliteration: Falā nakhāful-a‘dā'a wa lā nakhshāḍ-ḍarra mādāma-llāhu ma‘anā subḥānahu (95)
englishTranslation: So we do not fear enemies, nor do we dread harm, as long as Allah is with us, glorified is He. (Stanza 95)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te dunu ragal sunuy noon, te dunu tiit ci bépp loral, ndax Yàlla and na ak nun. (Wers 95)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ دُنُ رَجَلْ سُنُيْ نُونْ تِ دُنُ تِيتْ سِ بِيقْ لُرَلْ نْدَخْ يَٚlَّ اَنْدْ نَ اَكْ نُنْ [95]
